name: FCC Universal
description: Legacy 21-frame FCC composite retained from the upstream profile. It produced an FCC result on tested hardware, but only part of the sequence has an independently verified meaning; see docs/DUML_COMMAND_AUDIT.md.

frames.note: Opaque 10:58 request; identical payload also closes the sequence, so enter/exit semantics are unverified
Opaque 06:72 radio request; exact parameter and value semantics are unverified
Confirmed hash write: max_height=500; this is a flight-limit side effect, not an FCC primitive
Opaque 00:00 request; exact activation/change semantics are unverified
00:32 activation/provisioning-family request; payload semantics are unverified
03:AF GetAreaCode-family request; this payload's exact semantics are unverified
07:30 country/area write containing AU; the duplicate cannot be assigned to a separate band from current evidence
Duplicate 07:30 country/area write containing AU; band-specific purpose is unverified
Confirmed 09:27 SDR assistant register write: address 0xffff0048, value 2 (setForceFcc)
09:27 SDR assistant register write: address 0xffff0063, value 3; exact effect is unverified
07:18 country/area write containing AU; route-specific payload prefix ff
07:19 is a country-code query family, but non-empty payload c0 semantics are unverified
03:F9 write of unknown parameter hash 0xfbef4ad0 to value 1
03:F9 write of unknown parameter hash 0xfbef4ad0 to value 0
Opaque 00:E5 request; country-code interpretation is unverified
03:F9 write of unknown parameter hash 0x01826b23 to value 1
03:F9 write of unknown parameter hash 0x8ae67387 to value 1
Opaque 06:8C radio request with value 03; exact parameter is unverified
Opaque 06:8C radio request with value 01; exact parameter is unverified
Opaque 06:72 radio request; commit interpretation is unverified
Opaque 10:58 request identical to the first frame; enter/exit semantics are unverified
